metadata.description: Azure region for APIM and supporting resources.
Name of the API Management instance.
Microsoft Foundry / Azure OpenAI resource name.
Resource group that contains the Foundry resource.
Backend base URL, for example https://contoso.openai.azure.com.
Azure OpenAI-compatible API version to send to the backend.
Data-plane API version used to list Foundry deployments for the /models endpoint.
Client API key that callers must present as "Authorization: Bearer <key>". Stored as an APIM secret named value and validated in policy.
Optional tags applied to deployed resources.

variables.$fxv#0:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <set-variable name="presentedKey" value="@{
        var auth = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization", "");
        return auth.StartsWith("Bearer ", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            ? auth.Substring("Bearer ".Length).Trim()
            : "";
    }" />
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables["presentedKey"]) || (string)context.Variables["presentedKey"] != "{{byokClientKey}}")">
        <return-response>
          <set-status code="401" reason="Unauthorized" />
          <set-header name="WWW-Authenticate" exists-action="override">
            <value>Bearer error="invalid_token"</value>
          </set-header>
          <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
            <value>application/json</value>
          </set-header>
          <set-body>{"error":{"message":"Invalid or missing API key.","type":"invalid_request_error","code":"invalid_api_key"}}</set-body>
        </return-response>
      </when>
    </choose>
    <set-backend-service backend-id="foundry-backend" />
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>
variables.modelsPolicyXml:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <send-request mode="new" response-variable-name="foundryDeployments" timeout="20" ignore-error="true">
      <set-url>{{foundryDeploymentsUrl}}</set-url>
      <set-method>GET</set-method>
      <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://cognitiveservices.azure.com" />
    </send-request>
    <choose>
      <when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("foundryDeployments") && ((IResponse)context.Variables["foundryDeployments"]).StatusCode == 200)">
        <return-response>
          <set-status code="200" reason="OK" />
          <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
            <value>application/json</value>
          </set-header>
          <set-body><![CDATA[@{
              var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["foundryDeployments"];
              var created = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.ToUnixTimeSeconds();
              var upstream = resp.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true);
              var deployments = upstream["data"] as JArray ?? new JArray();
              var data = new JArray();
              foreach (var d in deployments) {
                  var id = (string)d["id"];
                  if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) { continue; }
                  data.Add(new JObject {
                      ["id"] = id,
                      ["object"] = "model",
                      ["created"] = created,
                      ["owned_by"] = (string)(d["owned_by"] ?? d["owner"]) ?? "azure-openai"
                  });
              }
              return new JObject {
                  ["object"] = "list",
                  ["data"] = data
              }.ToString();
          }]]></set-body>
        </return-response>
      </when>
      <otherwise>
        <return-response>
          <set-status code="502" reason="Bad Gateway" />
          <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
            <value>application/json</value>
          </set-header>
          <set-body><![CDATA[@{
              var status = context.Variables.ContainsKey("foundryDeployments")
                  ? ((IResponse)context.Variables["foundryDeployments"]).StatusCode.ToString()
                  : "no response";
              return new JObject {
                  ["error"] = new JObject {
                      ["message"] = "Failed to list Foundry deployments (upstream status: " + status + ").",
                      ["type"] = "api_error",
                      ["code"] = "deployments_unavailable"
                  }
              }.ToString();
          }]]></set-body>
        </return-response>
      </otherwise>
    </choose>
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>
variables.chatCompletionsPolicyXml:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <set-body>@{
        var body = context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true);

        var tools = body["tools"] as JArray;
        if (tools != null)
        {
            foreach (var tool in tools)
            {
                var fn = tool?["function"] as JObject;
                if (fn != null)
                {
                    var strictToken = fn["strict"];
                    if (strictToken == null || strictToken.Type == JTokenType.Null)
                    {
                        fn["strict"] = false;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return body.ToString();
    }</set-body>
  </inbound>
  <backend>
    <base />
  </backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
  </outbound>
  <on-error>
    <base />
  </on-error>
</policies>

properties.title: Microsoft Foundry
properties.description: Foundry deployment reached with the APIM managed identity.

metadata.description: Microsoft Foundry / Azure OpenAI account name.
Principal ID for the APIM managed identity.
Built-in role definition ID for Foundry data-plane access. Default is Foundry User.
